hero.headline: Collections
hero.body: Each collection carries its own discipline: atelier outer layers, heritage rhythm, and essential foundations designed to move through a modern European wardrobe with restraint.

atelier.title: Atelier
atelier.copy: Limited utility pieces shaped for editorial layering: structured, quiet, and made to carry the atmosphere of the studio into the street.
atelier.mood: Limited releases, brushed surfaces, handcrafted restraint, and elevated outer layers with a calm silhouette.

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.copy: Afro-European craft translated through restrained linework, warm utility, and silhouettes that feel composed without becoming ceremonial.
heritage.mood: Subtle textile rhythm, tonal hardware, warm function, and structured pieces built for movement.

essentials.title: Essentials
essentials.copy: The foundation layer of the AMAMBRA wardrobe: clean, tactile, and deliberately minimal so the rest of the system can breathe.
essentials.mood: Everyday premium cotton, quiet proportions, calm luxury, and pieces that hold their shape in daily rotation.
